semantic.role: View service SVG renderer for architecture diagrams. Transforms structured diagram specifications into safe, styled SVG markup, organizing nodes by layer and computing layout positions.
responsibilities: Define visual styles (fill, stroke) for each architecture node type.
Layout nodes by a fixed layer order to produce consistent vertical grouping.
Calculate horizontal positions for nodes within each layer.
Escape all dynamic text to prevent SVG injection.
Generate a complete, self-contained SVG document string.
outOfScope: Dependency on external rendering engines or infrastructure modules.
invariants: Every ArchNodeType must have a corresponding entry in NODE_STYLES (enforced by static Record).
Layer order is fixed as: frontend, backend, messagebus, database, security, cloud, external.
Output is always a valid SVG string with width/height viewBox and proper element nesting.
Module does not depend on infra modules (only imports view types).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain a lightweight, isolated SVG renderer for the architecture diagram view, ensuring it stays decoupled from any infrastructure or business logic.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: chore: apply release gate fixes and sync accumulated source changes — no semantic alteration to the renderer contract.

publicSurface.description: Class with a single static method 'render(spec: IArchDiagramSpec): string' that produces an SVG diagram string. Called by the diagram view producer to generate graphical output for architecture diagrams.
